inputs.label: Electron Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the particle (default is electron mass)

inputs.label: Elementary Charge
inputs.businessContext: Elementary electric charge (default is electron charge)

inputs.label: Accelerating Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Potential difference used to accelerate the particle

inputs.label: Wavelength Unit Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Factor to convert output wavelength to desired unit (e.g., 1e9 for nm)

formulas.wavelength: planckConstant / Math.sqrt(2 * electronMass * elementaryCharge * voltage) * unitMultiplier
